package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for panic_stack_trace_to_client: `recover()` in HTTP middleware that sends the panic message/stack to the response writer
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario727Negative(w http.ResponseWriter) {
	defer func() { if recover() != nil { http.Error(w, "internal error", http.StatusInternalServerError) } }()
}
